headline: CRISPR Therapeutics Enters 'Second Phase' as CASGEVY Momentum Builds, Pipeline Data Looms
summary: CRISPR Therapeutics (NASDAQ:CRSP) Chief Executive Officer Sam Kulkarni said the company is entering a “second phase” as it moves beyond the initial launch of CASGEVY and prepares for data from multiple pipeline programs over the next 12 to 18 months. Speaking at a Bank of America fireside chat host
